scripts.build: npx esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --outfile=dist/_worker.js --format=esm --platform=browser --define:window=globalThis --target=es2022 --external:node:* --define:process.env.NODE_ENV='"production"' --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace && mkdir -p dist/static && cp -r public/static/. dist/static/ && mkdir -p dist/assets && cp -r public/assets/. dist/assets/ && (cp -r public/audit dist/audit 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp -r public/team dist/team 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp public/favicon.ico dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp public/apple-touch-icon.png dist/ 2>/dev/null || true) && (cp public/_headers dist/ 2>/dev/null || true)
scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name india-gully --branch main
